title: The Skill Tax
hook_text: You're told you need years of skill
body_text: AI compresses the learning curve to weeks
voiceover_text: You're told you need years of skill before you can earn. That used to be true. Becoming a decent writer, editor, or designer took thousands of hours, and that wall stopped most people before they started. AI just demolished that wall. You don't need to be a great writer when a tool drafts for you and your job is to edit. You don't need to be an editor when a template does the heavy work. The skill that matters now isn't production, it's direction: knowing what's good, what to make, and who it's for. That's taste, and you build it in weeks of doing, not years of training. The barrier was never your lack of skill. It was believing you needed permission to begin. Comment READY if you're done waiting.
caption: You're told you need years of skill before you can earn, and AI just demolished that wall. You don't need to be a great writer when a tool drafts and you edit, or a great editor when a template does the heavy work. The skill that matters now is direction: knowing what's good and who it's for. That's taste, built in weeks. #aitools #passiveincome #financialfreedom #theleveragestack #wealthbuilding #sidehustle #aiautomation #buildingwealth
